publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 216-217. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest W. Letters came from Charlotte this morning, which have entirely satisfied H's mind about remaining.
I have written to Charlotte that I will go down, if she is taken ill before such

time as H-- ought to leave Town. They have only to send up a person immediately with a note to me, (which would not be very costly), & I would go of course instantly; & could be there very easily & quickly indeed.-- For no one is so easily packed off as I am.
Emily has been here. She tells me that every one admired my dress extremely.
I hear your Mother & the L. K's are quite Henry-Fortescue cracked at present. How very strangely they take up & put down.
